passage:
To: All Staff
From: IT Department
Date: Oct 25
Subject: Server Maintenance

Please be advised that the main server will be down for maintenance on Saturday, October 27th, from 10:00 PM to 2:00 AM. During this time, you will not be able to access your email or the company intranet.

We apologize for any [131]______ this may cause. We recommend saving all work locally before the maintenance begins.

If you have any urgent issues, please contact the Help Desk at ext. 5555.

questions.explanation: We apologize for the 'inconvenience' (noun) caused by the downtime.
The text states: 'We recommend saving all work locally'.
